summary: Defense neutralized (was defense_survives=3, now 1). Main fixes to Part 1 formula values and Part 7 disc-edge were already applied in a prior cycle. EXP-083 adds coefficient change history (~0.27→0.20) and the anomalous n=1.40 finding (requires c=0.097, matches no dome version) to the "fitted, not derived" subsection in Part 1. The replacement_html is a drop-in replacement for the existing h3+paragraphs. Verified all n(r) computations independently.
